name: @amends/action
description: The Amends GitHub Action: COMPILE, FIX, and RECONCILE stages

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/index.js --log-level=warning --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && esbuild agents/cli.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/agents/cli.js --log-level=warning --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
